pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor scope includes Design, Engineering, Supply, Installation, Testing, and commissioning of the Chiller-Based Air Dehumidification system.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: SCOPE OF WORK

pqr_criteria.criteria: Water Cooled Chillers: 2 units, each with 300 TR capacity.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Compressor Type must be Screw Compressor.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.2 Water Cooled Chillers

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Refrigerant must be R-134a, including the first charge.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.2 Water Cooled Chillers

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chiller Shell & Tube Evaporator and Condenser tubes must be made of SS 304.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.2 Water Cooled Chillers

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Water Cooled Screw Chiller are Kirloskar, Kehem’s, or Train.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: Make of Bought out Items

pqr_criteria.criteria: Air Handling Unit (AHU) must be a Double Skin type with a supply air fan capacity of 53000 CFM.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4 DOUBLE SKIN AIR HANDLING UNITS

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must achieve an outlet air temperature of 22°C +/- 2°C and relative humidity of 45% +/- 2%.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4 DOUBLE SKIN AIR HANDLING UNITS

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU cooling coil, casing, tubes, header, and drain pan must be made of SS 304. Fins must be plain aluminium.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4 DOUBLE SKIN AIR HANDLING UNITS

pqr_criteria.criteria: AHU must be equipped with a plug fan with VFD and a pre-filter section with 10-micron filters.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.4 DOUBLE SKIN AIR HANDLING UNITS

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for the Air Handling Unit (AHU) are Edgetech, Citizen, Zeco, or System Air.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: Make of Bought out Items

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be an induced draft type with a circulation flow rate sufficient for a 760 TR refrigeration load.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.3 Cooling Tower

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower must be designed for a Wet Bulb Temperature of 29°C and a cooling tower outlet temperature of 33°C.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.3 Cooling Tower

pqr_criteria.criteria: Cooling Tower basin, casing, and louvers must be made of FRP, with PVC for the fill and eliminator.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.3 Cooling Tower

pqr_criteria.criteria: A Chemical Dosing System for the Cooling Tower is required.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.31 Chemical Dosing system

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for the Cooling Tower are Advance cooling towers, Paharpur, Encon, Thermal care, or M square.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: Make of Bought out Items

pqr_criteria.criteria: Chilled Water and Condenser Water Pump sets must be provided in a 3-unit configuration (2 Working + 1 Standby) for each service.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5 & 4.6 Pump Set

pqr_criteria.criteria: All pumps must be centrifugal type with mechanical seals, suitable for a 600 TR refrigeration load.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5 & 4.6 Pump Set

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump motors must be IE-3 efficiency class, TEFC, with Class F insulation.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5 & 4.6 Pump Set

pqr_criteria.criteria: Pump materials of construction: Casing - Cast Iron, Impeller - Stainless Steel, Shaft - EN8.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: 4.5 & 4.6 Pump Set

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for Pumps are KSB, SULZER, KIRLOSKAR, WILO, WILFLEY, or GRUNDFOS.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: Make of Bought out Items

pqr_criteria.criteria: The electrical power supply at the site is 415 V +/- 10%, 50 Hz, 3 Phase, 4 Wire.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: BATTERY LIMIT DEFFINITION

pqr_criteria.criteria: The site area classification is Safe, dust-free, and non-hazardous; electrical equipment must be non-flameproof.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Approved makes for the PLC are Allen Bradley, Honeywell, or Schneider.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: Make of Bought out Items

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project installation site is located at Plot- K1, Taloja MIDC Road, MH 410208.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) will provide power and water for installation at one designated point.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: MAL Scope

pqr_criteria.criteria: Client (MAL) is responsible for obtaining all required permits for the job.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: MAL Scope

pqr_criteria.criteria: Vendor scope excludes OSBL (Outside Battery Limit) piping and electrical cable laying.
references: RFQ water cooled Chiller Package for HVAC Revised Sept 2025.docx, Section: MAL Scope
